title: SNAP Signal Breakdown: Key Levels to Watch Before Nov 10
author: henryzhangpku
selftext:
If you're tracking SNAP, this pattern hasn't appeared since its last major breakout.

Our quantitative models detected unusual volume divergence and a tightening Bollinger Band squeeze—historically a precursor to a 15-25% price move within 10 trading days.

Key data points from the analysis:

* RSI trending at 48 but showing bullish divergence on the 4H chart
* Critical support holding at $11.20 with resistance near $13.80
* Unusual options flow detected for November expirations

This isn't just a simple alert. The full analysis dives into:

* Probability-weighted scenarios for both breakout and breakdown
* Exact volume thresholds to confirm momentum
* How institutional positioning could accelerate the move

Full technical breakdown and trade plan available for those who want to see the math behind the signal. Tap to see why this is one of our highest-conviction stock signals this month.
